description: This was the first weekend of real promise this year, but my little-bitch-ness prevented this from being delivered. We were finally back to business as usual; Inverness Friday to Sunday. Good one in the hostel on Friday watching One, and up to a nice minus five degree icy drive-in on Saturday morning. A couple of hours into the project, the promised bluebird began to cloud over. Some subtle foreshadowing. We approached a steep icy decline onto a narrow-sided ridge, and I had to call it. Of course C. Vim Griffin sent it, but not for me. The project still ended covering around four-thousand feet of elevation gain, so enough to justify some beers. I developed a pretty damn good new system to get around the newly-enforced no drinking in Hostelling Scotland rule. The Yeti. We only got slightly messed up, I don't we were feeling it on the project downer, but we still managed to bag a Lucky Bowl, not from Lucky Star, but from J Sakura. Next time, it will actually be a Lucky Bowl from Lucky Bowl, but we only discovered that on our Sunday doomer Inverness lap.
